Class LogFilePublisher

java.lang.Object
iu.logging.internal.LogFilePublisher
class LogFilePublisher extends Object
Publishes log messages to files.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    LogFilePublisher(Path path, long maxSize, int nlimit)
    Constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) void
    flush()
    Synchronously writes all buffered data to the log file.
    (package private) void
    publish(String message)
    Publishes a formatted message to the log file.
    (package private) void
    rotate()
    Rotates log files.

  • Constructor Details

    • LogFilePublisher

      LogFilePublisher(Path path, long maxSize, int nlimit)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      path - Path of the primary log file
      maxSize - maximum file size
      nlimit - maximum number of backup files to retain

  • Method Details

    • rotate

      void rotate() throws IOException
      Rotates log files.
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs

    • flush

      void flush() throws IOException
      Synchronously writes all buffered data to the log file.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs

    • publish

      void publish(String message)
      Publishes a formatted message to the log file.
      Parameters:
      message - formatted message
